goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.title: Resource and fixture expansion
goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.

goals.title: Decision StopGate finance and review hardening
goals.objective: Strengthen finance/review, domain decision, and StopGate regressions so expanded knowledge remains deterministic, traceable, and review-safe.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance/review hardening: add or strengthen deterministic tests for stale finance source version, unsupported allocation inputs, disputed amounts, and manual-review-required finance triggers.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused finance/domain decision tests and happy/failure evidence pass, with source_refs and review reasons preserved.

successCriteria.scenario: StopGate/domain decision hardening: expanded rules produce conservative review/hold results for legal-source uncertainty, protected-property/income risks, bankruptcy/insolvency signals, and execution-title/service/finality uncertainty.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused StopGate/domain decision tests plus JSON evidence pass and no case falsely clears to execution-ready behavior.
Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Strengthen finance/review, domain decision, and StopGate regressions so expan....

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.title: Resource and fixture expansion
goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.

goals.title: Decision StopGate finance and review hardening
goals.objective: Strengthen finance/review, domain decision, and StopGate regressions so expanded knowledge remains deterministic, traceable, and review-safe.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance/review hardening: add or strengthen deterministic tests for stale finance source version, unsupported allocation inputs, disputed amounts, and manual-review-required finance triggers.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused finance/domain decision tests and happy/failure evidence pass, with source_refs and review reasons preserved.

successCriteria.scenario: StopGate/domain decision hardening: expanded rules produce conservative review/hold results for legal-source uncertainty, protected-property/income risks, bankruptcy/insolvency signals, and execution-title/service/finality uncertainty.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused StopGate/domain decision tests plus JSON evidence pass and no case falsely clears to execution-ready behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: broader legal ontology, debtor graph, route candidate, and MCP tests stay green after decision hardening.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A focused compatibility suite records passing tests across domain decisions, StopGates, route candidates, debtor graph, and MCP tools.

goals.title: Docs final eval and acceptance review
goals.objective: Update docs and working log, run final focused suite/JSON/PII/local MCP checks, and produce an accepted final contract review with no deployment/runbook mutation.

successCriteria.scenario: Docs/log update: update claim-domain ontology docs and the working log with the new source/research/scenario/decision status and remaining TODOs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Docs smoke finds the key terms and the working log references this wave's final state; PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.
Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Update docs and working log, run final focused suite/JSON/PII/local MCP check....
Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Update docs and working log, run final focused suite/JSON/PII/local MCP check....

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.title: Resource and fixture expansion
goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.

goals.title: Decision StopGate finance and review hardening
goals.objective: Strengthen finance/review, domain decision, and StopGate regressions so expanded knowledge remains deterministic, traceable, and review-safe.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance/review hardening: add or strengthen deterministic tests for stale finance source version, unsupported allocation inputs, disputed amounts, and manual-review-required finance triggers.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused finance/domain decision tests and happy/failure evidence pass, with source_refs and review reasons preserved.

successCriteria.scenario: StopGate/domain decision hardening: expanded rules produce conservative review/hold results for legal-source uncertainty, protected-property/income risks, bankruptcy/insolvency signals, and execution-title/service/finality uncertainty.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused StopGate/domain decision tests plus JSON evidence pass and no case falsely clears to execution-ready behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: broader legal ontology, debtor graph, route candidate, and MCP tests stay green after decision hardening.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A focused compatibility suite records passing tests across domain decisions, StopGates, route candidates, debtor graph, and MCP tools.

goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.

goals.title: Resource and fixture expansion
goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.
